question_text: A book is resting on a table. Which pair of forces are balanced?

options.label: A
options.text: The weight of the book pushing down and the normal force of the table pushing up

options.label: B
options.text: The friction force and the weight of the book

options.label: C
options.text: The normal force and the force of air resistance

options.label: D
options.text: The weight of the book and the force of gravity pulling sideways

explanation: When an object is at rest, the upward forces must equal the downward forces. The weight pulls the book down while the table pushes up with an equal normal force, keeping the book in equilibrium.
